# Keith Fount Solutions Ltd

> Creating spaces where life happens.

Keith Fount Solutions Ltd is a registered construction company in Nairobi, Kenya offering design and build, general construction, renovations, landscaping, consultancy, and specialist mahogany woodblock flooring.

## Contact
- Website: https://www.keithfount.co.ke/
- Email: keithfountsolutions@gmail.com
- Enquiry: https://www.keithfount.co.ke/contact/

## Services
- Design & Build: https://www.keithfount.co.ke/services/
- Mahogany flooring: https://www.keithfount.co.ke/craft/
- Projects: https://www.keithfount.co.ke/projects/
- About: https://www.keithfount.co.ke/about/
